scripts.build:backend: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/engine/ludoEngine.js && node --check src/rooms/roomStore.js && node --check src/events/eventLogStore.js && node --check src/realtime/turnTimerManager.js
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
